tentang.title: About Labuha
tentang.description: PT Labuha Inter Nusa is a Excellence, safety, and environmentally driven mining operations. Established on September 16, 2021, PT Labuha Inter Nusa (Labuha) has swiftly grown within the mineral and coal mining sector as a member of the ABM Group. With a dedicated workforce of 611 professionals, our operations span across the vibrant landscapes of Palu, Gorontalo, and other potential areas.

berita.title: News
berita.description: Read the latest news about PT Labuha Inter Nusa

keberlanjutan.title: Sustainability
keberlanjutan.description: At Labuha, our commitment to excellence extends beyond mining operations, encompassing strict Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) standards, environmental conservation, and positive impact on communities.

tentangPage.companyDesc1: Established on 16 September 2021, PT Labuha Inter Nusa (Labuha) has swiftly grown within the mineral and coal mining sector as a member of the ABM Group. With a dedicated workforce of 611 professionals, our operations span across the vibrant landscapes of Palu, Gorontalo, and other potential areas
tentangPage.companyDesc2: At Labuha, we embrace a culture of adaptability, working closely with our partners to enhance production while prioritizing workplace safety, environmental stewardship, and active participation in local community development. These principles not only guide our operations but underscore our responsibility toward sustainable practices and community welfare.

visi.title: Company Vision
visi.text: To become the best, most trusted, and most efficient partner in delivering the best mining services for sustainable company growth.

misi.title: Company Mission
items: To continuously provide mining services under the best management practices.
To provide added value and customer satisfaction through professional development of all resources.
To protect all stakeholders by prioritizing community interests and emphasizing health, safety, and environmental standards.
To support the development of the business by fostering the best environment for employees and business partners.

address.name: PT Labuha
address.detail: Bakrie Tower 23rd floor, Komplek Rasuna Epicentrum. Jl. HR Rasuna Said, Karet Kuningan, Setiabudi, Jakarta, 12940.

karir.title: Career
karir.subtitle: For career opportunities, please contact our Human Resources Department.
karir.empty: No vacancies available at the moment.

lingkungan.title: Environmental Stewardship
lingkungan.text: We work with the community to employ local wisdom in protecting the environment where we operate. We work with the experts from UNTAD for slope stability assessments and employ advanced environmental infrastructure such as oil traps, settling ponds, and water spray systems. Our commitment extends to nurturing local biodiversity through reforestation efforts and establishing a nursery for post-mining land reclamation.

masyarakat.title: Community Development
masyarakat.text: We actively engage in community development initiatives, including employing local residents, providing support for local infrastructure projects, and participating in religious and cultural festivities. We uphold a comprehensive Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) framework encompassing environmental sustainability, economic empowerment. societal welfare, and healthcare initiatives.

items.title: Safety First
items.text: Led by experienced HSE managers, we ensure rigorous adherence to safety protocols and continuous improvement in HSE management. Our workforce undergoes regular training to uphold safe and effective operations, supported by cutting-edge technology and equipment. Through our Safety Committee, every level of our organization, from directors to operational supervisors, contributes to fostering a secure working environment.

items.title: Environmental Stewardship
items.text: We work with the community to employ local wisdom in protecting the environment where we operate. We work with experts from UNTAD for slope stability assessments and employ advanced environmental infrastructure such as oil traps, settling ponds, and water spray systems. Our commitment extends to nurturing local biodiversity through reforestation efforts and establishing a nursery for post-mining land reclamation.

items.title: Community Development
items.text: We actively engage in community development initiatives, including employing local residents, providing support for local infrastructure projects, and participating in religious and cultural festivities. We uphold a comprehensive Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) framework encompassing environmental sustainability, economic empowerment, societal welfare, and healthcare initiatives.

bisnisPage.title: Comprehensive and efficient mining services
bisnisPage.description: Labuha offers complete and efficient mining services to ensure smooth material handling, timely material supply for processing, and comprehensive area reclamation across all operational sites. We always strive to meet operational needs quickly while maintaining safety, environmental preservation, and community engagement. We operate strategically in Palu (Gold Mine), Gorontalo (Quarry), and other potential regions.

services.title: Extraction
services.text: We offer a range of extraction services utilizing cutting-edge equipment and tecniques to ensure safety and efficiency

services.title: Processing
services.text: We help you optimize mineral processing with tailored solutions to ensure maximize yields.

services.title: Mine Reclamation
services.text: We take responsibility for the environmental impact of the mine by implementing sustainable practices and helping restore the land after extraction.

services.title: Equipment Management
services.text: We help you professionally manage mining equipment to ensure optimal efficiency and productivity.

penghargaan.title: Awards & Certifications
penghargaan.caption: Labuha's commitment to excellent and sustainable mining practices has earned awards and certifications reflecting the best standards in the industry.
